notes: Fixed 2 orphaned function nodes in frontend/src/api/client.ts by adding missing contains edges (functions existed as nodes but had no container link to the file).
All 967 edges reference valid nodes. All nodes have required fields (id, type, summary, tags).

No 'could not fix' items from the merge script needed action - the 'no id' nodes 432-435 were edge-level constructs (contains/imports as node types) that the scanner did not produce as nodes, consistent with expected behavior.

Major gap: 290 of 344 file nodes have NO function/class extraction and NO contains edges. Affected areas include 22 gateway implementations, 20 model files, 8 store files, 7 type files, 6 service files, and 70+ Vue components. This is a batch-analyzer limitation, not a merge-script issue.

4 backend source files (chinese_pod.py, json_feed.py, verified_badge.py, add_work_fields.py) were scanned and placed in import-map but found to have zero exports. No function nodes were produced for them, and no other file imports them by exported symbol. They are legitimately disconnected.
16 real test files (backend/tests/*) have no function nodes extracted - test files were analyzed as empty stubs. Frontend test files are similarly empty.
2 table nodes (Taobao CSV certificates) have no edges - tables are standalone data artifacts, acceptable.
Import map coverage is excellent: 333 of 334 applicable import edges present. Only 1 self-import in middleware/logging.py is absent (likely a code-smell in the source file, not a graph issue).
Complexity distribution is healthy: 677 simple, 273 moderate, 106 complex. No unknown complexity values present.
5 flipped tested_by edges were correctly corrected by the merge script. Remaining 5 are properly directed (file -> test file, direction=forward).
7 dropped tested_by edges (orphan endpoint or test-to-test/prod-to-prod pairs) were correctly excluded.
